free_bitcoin_postcards: Amakhadi Okuthumela e-Bitcoin Amahhala evela ku-bitcoin.rocks
postcards_description: Thola Iphakethe Lamakhadi Okuthumela e-Bitcoin Amahhala futhi wabelane nge-Bitcoin nomuntu omaziyo.
postcards_program_closed_message: Uhlelo lwethu lwamakhadi okuthumela e-Bitcoin amahhala seluphelile. Siyabonga kuwo wonke umuntu owabamba iqhaza ekusakazeni imfundo ye-Bitcoin ngeposi!
postcards_sticker_alternative_message: Qhubeka nokusabalalisa ukuqwashisa nge-Bitcoin ngohlelo lwethu lwezitika zamahhala! Izitika zethu ze-Bitcoin zinhle zokwabelana ezindaweni zomphakathi futhi zinamakhodi e-QR axhumana nokuqukethwe kwemfundo.
postcards_instructions_4: Senze la makhadi okuthumela ukuze kube lula kuwe ukwethula umuntu omaziyo ku-Bitcoin! Faka nje ikheli nesitembu bese ushiya ikhadi lakho lokuthumela eposini.
postcards_instructions_5: Umgomo wethu ukusheshisa ukwamukelwa kwe-Bitcoin. Ungasiza ngokuthola izitika zamahhala futhi uzibeke ezindaweni zomphakathi!
postcards_instructions_6: Sonke sazi abantu abambalwa abangasizakala ngokufunda kabanzi nge-Bitcoin. Yabelana ngezitika ze-Bitcoin nabo namuhla!
